name: Chocolate Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper Preparation Time: 1 hour
In a mixing bowl, beat eggs, oil, sugar and vanilla.
Stir in zucchini. Combine dry ingredients; add to zucchini mixture and mix well.
Pour into 2 greased 8 x 4 x 2 loaf pans.
Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until bread tests done. Yield:
2 loaves.
